allow: Bash(obsidian daily:append content="- [ ] tqqq, soxl 무한 매수 구매")
Bash(mv add_daily_tqqq_task.ps1 add_daily_tqqq_task.ps1.bak && mv add_daily_tqqq_task_temp.ps1 add_daily_tqqq_task.ps1)

Bash(powershell -Command "\(Get-Content 'add_daily_tqqq_task.ps1' -Raw\) | Out-File 'add_daily_tqqq_task_temp.ps1' -Encoding UTF8" && mv add_daily_tqqq_task.ps1 add_daily_tqqq_task.ps1.bak2 && mv add_daily_tqqq_task_temp.ps1 add_daily_tqqq_task.ps1)
Bash(obsidian daily:append content="- [ ] Command injection 테스트")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "obsidian write path='01_Project/01.2 데일리노트/2026-03-12.md' content='- [x] TQQQ Infinite Buy Task\\n- [x] Command injection 테스트'")
